PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?eventLabel(YEAR(?startTime) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q207628 .
  ?event wdt:P641 wd:Q15406 .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(?eventLabel , "ladies' singles" , "i"))

  ?athleteStatement ps:P1344 ?winner .
  ?athleteStatement pq:P1617 wd:Q1992243 .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
  ?event wdt:P580 ?startTime .
}
ORDER BY ?year
